sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الخَطُّ العَرَبِيُّ فَنًّا جَمِيلًا وَرَائِعًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija se smatra veoma lijepom i veličanstvenom umjetnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is considered a very beautiful and magnificent art.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الفَنَّانُونَ الكَلِمَاتِ بِأَشْكَالٍ هَنْدَسِيَّةٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici pišu riječi u različitim geometrijskim oblicima.
sentences.translationEn: Artists write words in various geometric shapes.

sentences.arabic: نَرَى هَذَا الفَنَّ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ المَسَاجِدِ وَالقُصُورِ القَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vidimo ovu umjetnost na zidovima džamija i starih palata.
sentences.translationEn: We see this art on the walls of mosques and ancient palaces.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ تَعَلُّمُ الخَطِّ إِلَى الصَّبْرِ وَالتَّدْرِيبِ المُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: Učenje kaligrafije zahtijeva strpljenje i kontinuirano vježbanje.
sentences.translationEn: Learning calligraphy requires patience and continuous practice.

sentences.arabic: يَفْتَخِرُ العَرَبُ بِهَذَا التُّرَاثِ الفَنِّيِّ العَرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi su ponosni na ovo drevno umjetničko naslijeđe.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs are proud of this ancient artistic heritage.
